context.projectOverview: Sprint 10 iteration 1 FAILED on s10-c6. Iteration 1 produced commit d3264d1 which covers 8/9 criteria. Two missing behaviors require fixing.

failedCriteria.description: PR title format 'bober: <runId> — <feature-name>'; PR body lists each checkpoint as a checkbox item; new comment per checkpoint. Mergeable from draft to ready when ALL checkpoints approved.
failedParts: PR body has only a static placeholder ('Checkpoint comments will be appended below as the run progresses.') — no per-checkpoint '- [ ] <checkpointId>' checkbox items
No draft→ready conversion when all checkpoints approved — GhClient has no prReady method, poll resolution never marks ready
fixRequirements: FIX 1: Per-checkpoint checkbox list. Maintain a Map<CheckpointId, 'pending'|'approved'|'rejected'> on the mechanism instance. On each request() call, BEFORE polling, add a new GhClient.prEdit(prNumber: number, body: string) call that re-renders the PR body with one '- [ ] <id>' line per known checkpoint. When a checkpoint resolves: if approved, update its line to '- [x] <id>' (call prEdit again after resolution). Update renderPrBody() to accept the checkpoint map and render checkboxes.

FIX 2: Draft→ready transition. Add GhClient.prReady(prNumber: number): Promise<void> wrapping 'gh pr ready <number>'. After a checkpoint resolves as approved, count pending checkpoints in the map. If pending count is 0 AND no rejections, call gh.prReady(runPrNumber) to mark the draft PR ready for review. Do NOT call prReady if any checkpoint was rejected.

FIX 3 (optional, low priority): The MIN_POLL_MS warning at line 323 of pr.ts says 'clamping' but does not clamp. Either clamp via Math.max(rawPollMs, MIN_POLL_MS) OR change the warning text to 'using configured value but may hit rate limits' — pick one.
newTestsRequired: Test: after pr.request('post-research', {}) → prCreate call's body argument contains the line '- [ ] post-research'
Test: after pr.request resolves as approved → prEdit was called with body containing '- [x] post-research'
Test: two checkpoints both approved → prReady was called with the run PR number
Test: one approved + one rejected → prReady was NOT called
Test: only one checkpoint, approved → prReady IS called (single-checkpoint case)

evaluatorFeedback.preserveBehavior: All 8 passing criteria (s10-c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c7, c8, c9) and existing 25 tests must continue to pass. Do not break the gh-availability fallback to disk (s10-c4) or the override resolver (s10-c5).
